internal_anchors.details: All 190 unique href="#..." targets resolve to elements in docs/index.html. node test.js passes 3380/3380 (covers Section 3 Internal Links).

tab_structure.details: 12 tab-content divs, all unique IDs. Every nav-bar and inline showTab('...') target resolves to a real tab. Heading hierarchy clean inside every tab (no skipped levels). sectionNav prev/next chain not present in rendered HTML (superseded by top tab bar — known long-standing divergence, not a regression).

broken.note: 404 on both HEAD and GET. The correct path is /predictions/data/daily_review.json (200 OK, 4370 bytes); the /api/current/ prefix does not exist. Same file is correctly linked at line 4266.

external_links.details: 71 unique non-citation external URLs; 67 OK, 1 broken, 2 timeouts, 1 transient recovery on retry (atoptics.co.uk). The broken link is a legitimate data source reference that points at the wrong path on the dome author's site. podaac.jpl.nasa.gov SSL handshakes timed out on two attempts; classified timeout not broken.

data_prose_consistency.details: Scorecard verdict cards (9/14/22/18/4/4) sum to 71 and match wins.json exactly. HTML renders '8 acknowledged' failures and uncounted-failures.json has 8 entries. Title retains '69 Claimed Wins' (dome-author-claimed count, intentional). All 71 WINs have tldr_evidence + tldr_verdict; all 16 is_genuinely_prospective predictions have tldr.

win_detail_consistency.details: All 71 WINs have a corresponding id="winNNN" anchor in docs/index.html. 0 missing tldr_evidence/tldr_verdict. detail_group set on members of 8 groups, consistent.

win_number_alignment.details: john09289.github.io/predictions/wins.html exposes WIN-001 through WIN-069. Our 71 IDs resolve to the same 69 numeric cores (extras are sub-letters like 057b). No number collisions or alias pairs detected on the dome wins page.

progressive_disclosure.details: 18 H2s outside <details> in total; all are structural separators (tab headers, verdict-group bars inside the wins tab, scorecard headings). Prior-report interpretation (intentional structural headers) carried forward. 0 empty ps-tldr/ks-tldr blocks.

hardcoded_theme_colors.details: Unchanged from 2026-04-18 integrity report. Both violate the dark theme but are long-standing; fix = replace with var(--card-bg) or wrap image in a light-bg inner container if thumbnail legibility is required.

discoverability.details: llms.txt (5470 B) contains review URL and dome mention; no hardcoded WIN counts to go stale. sitemap.xml well-formed (urlset root) with main page + llms.txt loc entries, both 200. robots.txt has Allow:/ and Sitemap: directive. docs/index.html head has meta description, og:title, og:description, and application/ld+json ClaimReview block.

uncounted_failures_schema.details: FAIL-001 through FAIL-008, no dup IDs, all four required fields (id, dome_ref, dome_label, what_actually_happened) present. Matches the '8 acknowledged' HTML placeholder render.

expansion_tracker.details: next_id > max_id (no collision imminent). Single unexplained gap EXP-052 is carried forward from prior reports. All 188 tracker entries with status=complete and an output_file resolve; no orphan EXP-NNN.json files in expansions/ missing from the tracker.

priority_queue_coupling.details: Every expansion-tracker item in category section-new or category-proposal-writeup with status!=integrated has a matching priority-queue entry (target_id or context_hints.related_issues). 0 decoupled items.

workspace_sync_skips.details: Skip log has no entries in the last 24h. This is fine for direction-violation detection (no writer is on the wrong side), but suggests the workspace-sync agent has not run in some time — see workspace_only_files finding.

digest_parse_errors.details: Fresh regeneration via digest-reviews.js --workspace . reports 0 parse errors in monitor/curmudgeon/reviews/.

digest_coverage.details: 5 unprocessed reviews; all 5 are identical to the workspace-only list below (decider clones fresh and therefore never sees them). Not a digest pipeline filter bug — it's the workspace-sync gap.

workspace_only_files.details: 10 workspace-only files at risk. Workspace-sync commit in git is ~22h old, well past the advertised 4h cycle. 8 of 10 files are >18h old — they should have been picked up by at least 4 sync runs by now. Two possibilities: (a) the sync agent is failing silently (check scheduled task logs and PAT rotation — the repo copy of .workspace-sync-token is marked REVOKED since Apr 10, but the Apr 18 13:10Z sync commit shows something was still pushing), or (b) the sync agent ran but its writes were rejected (e.g., PAT expiry now biting after the Apr 10 revocation). Recovery: re-enable sync PAT and run the sync agent once; alternatively, the decider can commit the 10 listed files from its clean clone.

build_reproducibility.diff_summary:
Only line 244:

April 18, 2026  |  Version 6...

→ April 19, 2026. The build embeds today's date on every run; the published HTML simply predates today's rebuild. No data drift.
build_reproducibility.details: Fresh clone at b2ed05e, node build.js html, git diff docs/index.html = 1 line (date bump). All 71 WINs, 96 predictions, and 8 failures render identically to a from-source rebuild. Tests pass 3380/3380 on both sides.

claude_md_paths.details: CLAUDE.md mechanical spot-check: all five spot-checked absolute paths exist (data/wins.json, data/sections.json, monitor/analyst/expansion-tracker.json, monitor/curmudgeon/priority-queue.json, build.js). The 'missing' paths from naive grep are relative basenames (decider.md, poller.md, etc.) that actually exist under monitor/prompts/; not regressions. No hardcoded counts detected in CLAUDE.md — all numeric claims are wrapped in query commands.

mode5_orphan_reference.details: Still workspace-only (not in git) and still not wired up — analyst.md lists Modes 0, 1, 1b, 2, 2b, 3, 4 but no Mode 5. Unchanged from 2026-04-18 report's Minor #5. Decide: commit and wire up, or delete.

issues_found.description: Broken data source URL in sections.json: https://john09289.github.io/predictions/api/current/daily_review.json → 404.
issues_found.location: data/sections.json, part8b.html (single occurrence); renders at docs/index.html line 2558.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Replace '/api/current/daily_review.json' with '/data/daily_review.json' (confirmed 200 OK, 4370 bytes; and it is the path used elsewhere in the same section, docs/index.html line 4266).

issues_found.description: 10 workspace-only files (5 curmudgeon reviews, 5 analyst expansions) have not been committed to git. 8 of them are >18h old; the workspace-sync agent has not pushed a 'Workspace sync:' commit since 2026-04-18T13:10Z (~22h ago), i.e. at least 4 missed 4h cycles. The 5 unprocessed reviews in digest coverage are exactly these 5 workspace-only review files — the decider in its clean clone cannot see them.
issues_found.suggested_fix: 1) Verify the workspace-sync scheduled task is still running (the repo .workspace-sync-token was marked REVOKED on Apr 10 but sync continued; a second PAT rotation may have finally taken effect). 2) As a one-off, the decider can commit the 10 listed files from its clean clone to unblock the digest pipeline. 3) If the sync agent is dead, restore it before the backlog grows further.

issues_found.description: Two hardcoded light-theme color literals in sections.json inline styles (carried forward from 2026-04-18).
issues_found.location: data/sections.json part1.html (#f5f5f5 on WGS84 gravity formula), part6.html (#fff on Tesla patent image card)
issues_found.suggested_fix: Replace with var(--card-bg). For the Tesla image card, keep the white inner container around the if legibility requires it but swap the outer panel to the theme variable.

issues_found.description: Two podaac.jpl.nasa.gov URLs timed out on SSL handshake on two attempts.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Monitor — the site may be intermittently blocking automated requests. If the timeouts persist across multiple daily runs, escalate.

issues_found.description: Expansion tracker gap at EXP-052 persists (sequence skips 051 → 053).
issues_found.suggested_fix: Analyst or decider should either backfill with a 'skipped' marker entry or explicitly note the cause so the gap stops recurring in integrity reports.

issues_found.description: monitor/prompts/reference/analyst-mode5-prospective.md exists on workspace only (not committed) and analyst.md does not reference 'Mode 5'. Orphaned documentation.
issues_found.suggested_fix: Commit and wire up analyst.md with a Mode 5 section, or delete the file.

summary: Site structure, data-prose consistency, and build reproducibility all pass. 3380/3380 tests green. The two material findings are (1) a broken data source link in sections.json part8b (the dome author's /api/current/daily_review.json returns 404; /data/daily_review.json is the correct path, already used elsewhere in the same section) and (2) a workspace-sync stall — 10 files (5 curmudgeon reviews, 5 analyst expansions), 8 of them >18h old, have not made it to git; no 'Workspace sync:' commit in ~22h, well past the 4h cycle. The decider should fix the URL and either commit the 10 workspace-only files or diagnose the sync agent before the backlog grows. Hardcoded-color, tracker-gap, and orphan-Mode-5-reference findings are carry-forwards from the 2026-04-18 report and remain unfixed.
